scripts.build: npm -w packages/shared run build && npm -w apps/web run build && npm -w apps/dealer-portal run build
scripts.lint: npm -w packages/shared run lint && npm -w apps/web run lint && npm -w apps/dealer-portal run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w packages/shared run typecheck && npm -w apps/web run typecheck && npm -w apps/dealer-portal run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w apps/web run test && npm -w apps/dealer-portal run test
